subject: General Awareness
question_text: Which of the following statements about the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) is correct?

options.text: It was established in 1992 as a regulatory body
It is Asia's oldest stock exchange established in 1875
It operates only electronic trading since inception
It regulates mutual funds in India

solution.final_answer: It is Asia's oldest stock exchange established in 1875

explanation.concept: BSE is the oldest stock exchange in Asia, founded in 1875.
step_by_step: It is the oldest exchange in Asia

why_incorrect.C: Electronic trading was pioneered by NSE
